-
Fa
WATTAGEE I.P.
A total of 11,000 metres of dipole ~ dipole 1.P. surveying has been
completed on 17 separate traverses at 10 localities in the Wattagee
area.
All localities were selected on the basis of Turam EM responses.
Dipole spacings employed were either 100',
200',
or 300'.
